name: PROTEIN_ENGINEER
description: In-silico protein design bench: takes a target + epitope to designed, structurally validated, developable binders and multivalent scaffolds. Composes the binder-design, developability-hardening, and multivalent-display skills with the structure-model skills (RFdiffusion/MPNN/AlphaFold/Boltz/Chai/ESMFold) and remote GPU compute, with strict fold-back and developability discipline.
